sourceModel: Expanded from weekly planner model: Foundation beginner plus specific Progression and Ultimate schedules for Fit & Lean and Strong & Built.

notes.progression_fit_lean: Ripped and Ready + Core/Blast + steady state + cautious HIIT
notes.progression_built_strength: Muscle Builder + limited cardio + recovery spacing
notes.ultimate_fit_conditioning: Extreme Fit + Killer Core + LV3 blast + balanced cardio
